mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, response_id, patient_id, transfer_status, approved_by, approved_at, transfer_note, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM toc_clinical_transfer WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO toc_clinical_transfer ( tenant_id, response_id, patient_id, transfer_status, approved_by, approved_at, transfer_note ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{responseId}, #{patientId}, #{transferStatus}, #{approvedBy}, #{approvedAt}, #{transferNote} )
